_comment: Illustrative large-bank inputs (JPMorgan-shaped, NOT a live call). Money in $M, shares in M, rates as decimals. Drives financial_valuation.py (excess-return on equity). Numbers are round and defensible, chosen as a reproducibility anchor, not a published valuation.
_roe: through-cycle ROE fades from a strong 17% toward a still-healthy 15% normal
_payout: dividends + buybacks ~ 55% of net income; the rest compounds book
_ke: cost of equity 10% during the explicit period, drifting to a mature 9%
_terminal: stable growth 3%; terminal ROE 12% keeps a modest perpetual spread over a 9% Ke
_failure: small tail probability of a crisis impairment (2008-style); distress value ~ 0.4x book
